Pure Veg · Live Cooking

Our Delicious Menu

Every chapati is freshly rolled and cooked live on our tawa. Simple ingredients, extraordinary taste.

🫓
Plain Chapati
Soft, thin, freshly rolled whole wheat chapati cooked live on tawa. Best enjoyed hot!
₹8Pure Veg
🧈
Butter Chapati
Our signature chapati generously topped with fresh butter for that irresistible richness.
₹15Pure Veg
⭐ Best Seller
🍛
Channa Masala
Slow-cooked chickpeas in a rich, spiced masala gravy. The perfect chapati companion!
₹25Pure Veg
🍲
Veg Kuruma
A creamy, mildly spiced mixed vegetable kurma slow-cooked with coconut and whole spices.
₹25Pure Veg
🫘
Pattani Kuruma
Tender green peas in a flavourful kurma gravy, rich with coconut milk and aromatic spices.
₹25Pure Veg
🍅
Tomato Kuruma
Tangy, vibrant tomato-based kurma with a beautiful balance of spice and sweetness.
₹25Pure Veg
🫚
Dal Kuruma
Hearty lentil kurma packed with protein, simmered with warming Indian spices.
₹25Pure Veg
🧀 Premium
🧀
Paneer Butter Masala
Soft paneer cubes in a creamy, buttery, aromatic masala — our most loved premium dish!
₹80Pure Veg
🌶️ Special
🥦
Gobi Manchurian
Crispy cauliflower florets tossed in a tangy, spicy Indo-Chinese Manchurian sauce. A crowd favourite!
₹80Pure Veg
🍄 Special
🍄
Mushroom Masala
Juicy mushrooms cooked in a bold, aromatic masala curry — rich, hearty and utterly satisfying!
₹80Pure Veg

Our Story

Made with Love,
Served with Pride

Vishagan Live Chapati was born from a passion for wholesome, homestyle Indian food. Located in the heart of Valasarawakkam on VOC Street, we wake up at the crack of dawn every single day to ensure you get the freshest, hottest chapati possible.

We believe great food should never cost a fortune. From our ₹8 plain chapati to our rich Paneer Butter Masala, every item is crafted with the finest ingredients and cooked live right in front of you — no shortcuts, no compromise.

100% pure vegetarian. Open 365 days a year. From 4:30 AM for early risers to 11:30 PM for late-night cravings — we're always here for you.

📞 Call Us 📍 Find Us
